reviews.review_title: A Must Have For Your Go
reviews.review_description: Immersive, visually amazing, seemless controls, this is by far the best FPS game I have played on the oculus go. In fact it is THE best game I have played on the Oculus Go! � � ���

This game is amazing and I would love to give it 5 stars, however, once you get to rank 34 it doesn’t appear that you can move further than that. It would be great if it can take you into other areas other than the office and subway and you can only continue with a new stage once a day. I even got a perfect score without hitting one hostage and my ranking never moved forward. Please add a Swat Academy 2. I would purchase in heartbeat!
Swat Academy and Gun Club are my favorite games on the Oculus. I am handicapped and can’t turn a lot so these games are great.
It’s a really fun game and addicting I always come back to this game!

I love this game so much! I think I missed my true calling. I like that you don't have to spend to get more weapons, or upgrade the ones you have. You earn money as you progress and obtain new rank.It is a very consuming game,for me at least.  I didn't do anything else this weekend but play!! Be warned!! I read a couple other replies about not getting the 4 stars if you pass the level before obtaining it. I have gone back- before I got to the last level tho and have been able to get all 4 stars.It takes awhile. I think the number of excess rounds might weigh in, accuracy etc. Certain levels seem impossible, but I have succeeded in the 4 stars. If you are able to do it over and over,you'll see how to get the shooters between the hostages. What a great feeling to get past those. I am, however, stuck on the last round of the office building with my assault rifle. I have received 4 stars but the screen is blank!? I am going to play the round until I die or it registers or I perhaps ask someone who might know the problem. I usually am terrible at video games, but with Oculus and especially SWAT, I am climbing the ranks and will be in charge soon! I wondered for a bit about playing, I'm so glad I purchased it! I recommend it for anyone! Fab Fun!
Worth the money and lots of fun.  No having to spend money in the game either
I really like this game. Waiting for the Quest version.
The different types of guns are great! I'd give the app 5 stars if we can have more variety of opponents than cardboards

Great game all around. There are just a few levels where one are 2 targets are impossible to shoot, and its all because you can't shoot over counters. There is also one in the office that you can't get to because of the glass door. Just a heads up for new users but very minor considering everything else.

Simple concept executed really well. Keep coming back to this shooter and spend a lot of time playing. Graphics great and the choice of aiming and accuracy very nice. Excellent way to spend your time and the Zombie modes are awesome!!

reviews.review_title: Very realistic, buy it. Need a tweak tho
reviews.review_description:
PROS: I really enjoy this game. I particularly like the feeling of really being there. Best played standing up, your adrenalin levels rise when assailants pop up right next to you. You really get in the zone. VR was made for this type of game. The development team have done a fantastic job.

CONS: This game will improve if it let you start from the beginning again instead of returning to the highest level you've achieved. E.g. if I complete level 18 of 18 and decide to start again on level 1, once I complete it, it jumps to level 18 instead of going to level 2.  Perhaps having more than one profile might address it, or an option to "Start from Here' option.

Given it 4/5 due to the above. Still worth buying !

I am quite pleased with this game and I've had lots of fun grinding my way through.  However...why have sniper rifles and "sniper range" achievements if there are no actual sniper ranges?  I've played through the subway with a pistol, SMG and AR (with 4 stars on each level).  I've played through the office with a pistol, SMG and AR (with 4 stars on each level)...still no sniper range has unlocked.  I guess I'm done?  It was fun though!

reviews.review_title: Very Similar to Gun Club vr
reviews.review_description: Worth it
The game is unbelievable ,fun  & Challenge.
Great shooting game. Many areas with multiple levels of challenges that gradually get harder to complete. Very addicting game.

This is awesome on the Go, you’ve gotta try this.  I only wish it was expanded and that we had a better roadmap of locations or features without feeling hidden.  If you crave more, check out Gun Club 3.  Otherwise, I'm hoping by completing various levels using the chosen weapons I'll be able to open up other areas of the map.  I'm not really sure on the progression with this, but I do have to say that it keeps me coming back for more.
Highly recommend

like gun club 3 vr, no laser sight yet (oculus go). when this update comes, i'll change my review to 5 stars and stand on the street corner handing out promotional flyers for this game.

also annoying - after you complete levels, say for example you complete levels 1-20.... when you want to go back to do them all over again for fun, starting at 1, each time you complete a level you have to remember which one you just did, because the game automatically sets you at the highest level you completed EVER. you basically have to write this down to keep track, which is a pain in the butt with the headset on!

fyi i'm going to venture the likely possibility that some of the other flaws of gun club 3 vr also apply to this game, although to be honest i don't know...but i'm not going to take the chance, for example, of spending a gazillion dollars on a tricked-out fully-accessorized weapon only to have the 100-round magazine unavailable for it. as a veteran of the boer war i deserve the best gobble gobble gobble

reviews.review_title: Now this is a Mfin game
reviews.review_description: VR is cool and all. Getting to experience what you can. But I was bored with all the free games and really wanted something that could capture me and I could lose time in. This is that game
Is a good time passer but you need to make more ways to make more cash. 4/5
